title: [MTR4] 丹尼士三叉戟三型 | Dennis Trident 3
description: The first ever double-decker low-floor bus has come to your Minecraft world!
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **Dennis Trident 3** is the first low-floor tri-axle double-decker bus produced by Dennis Specialist Vehicles in the UK. It was produced between 1995 to 2002 and was mostly sold to the overseas market. 

This resource pack is to add the Dennis Trident 3 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in 2022.

# What will be in this pack?
1. Dennis Trident 3 Euro 3 (ATR299-ATR354, 369-392)
2. Dennis Trident 3 Euro 3 (ATR299-ATR354, 369-392) with luggage rack

All vehicles are in KMB / SUNB "Champagne Gold" livery.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, The Kowloon Motor Bus Company (1933) Limited.
